policy.identity_definition: official source snapshot plus ordered transformation plus raw SHA-256 hashes plus interface SHA-256 hash
policy.query_rule: different query protocols may share a graph only when they point to the identical frozen interface graph
policy.paper_naming: source-and-snapshot-qualified names are mandatory; an informal name such as IMDb is not an identity

comparison.byte_difference_reason: edge row order and line endings

verified_reconstruction.conclusion: The official RDF reconstruction independently recovers the prior graph semantics; only the official-source interface is eligible for formal use.

non_identity_cases.result: not comparable as the same graph
non_identity_cases.reason: the current official daily export is frozen and available, while the paper's 2016 interface snapshot and complete transformation are unavailable

non_identity_cases.result: DBLP-AMiner-V18 is included under its qualified identity; the two author artifacts remain separate and excluded
non_identity_cases.reason: the formal graph is rebuilt from the full official AMiner V18 record stream and has its own source, transform and interface hashes; the same informal DBLP name does not establish identity

non_identity_cases.result: not treated as the same snapshot
non_identity_cases.reason: Toronto-current uses the complete current official Centreline V2 and POI exports; it is included only under its qualified identity and is not claimed byte-identical to the historical paper graph
